title: The First FIDIC OSH Meeting Was Held
excerpt: Participants discussed the application of FIDIC contracts, the role of the Engineer, construction quality, and the initiative to launch a FIDIC Club.

title: Первая встреча FIDIC OSH состоялась
excerpt: Участники обсудили применение контрактов FIDIC, роль Инженера, качество строительства и инициативу по созданию FIDIC Club.

title: FIDIC OSH'ning birinchi uchrashuvi bo'lib o'tdi
excerpt: Ishtirokchilar FIDIC shartnomalarini qo'llash, Muhandis roli, qurilish sifati va FIDIC Club tashkil etish tashabbusini muhokama qildilar.
